series_metadata.series_description: Administrative Hearing Files, Notice of Hearings, Transcripts, Report of Proposed Findings, Settlement Docs, and Final Adjudication Orders

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until entire record is scanned to electronic medium for storage and scan is checked for accuracy; then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain 75 years, unless no longer needed for longer period of time based on legal or administrative significance, Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Erase
